title: aspidium zeylanicum
intro: Aspidium zeylanicum, also known as the Ceylonese Polypody, is a type of fern native to Sri Lanka. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Aspidium zeylanicum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Aspidium zeylanicum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
